response.justification: Bogdan possesses strong domain expertise in geospatial data processing and building highly scalable, low-latency distributed systems. However, he lacks recent professional experience in modern C++ or Rust, which are the primary required technologies for this role, having predominantly utilized TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in recent years.
strengths: Extensive experience in geospatial data processing and GIS platforms (Founder of GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven track record building high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems (handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby).
Strong commitment to rigorous quality assurance, TDD, and automated testing frameworks.
concerns: Lacks recent and primary experience in Modern C++ or Rust, the core languages required for the role.
Most recent roles heavily focus on full-stack web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than low-level data pipelines.
No explicit experience mentioned with routing algorithms or navigation guidance systems, primarily focusing on map data collection.
